t-1.notes: feature: security audit run dirs · NewRun @ internal/security/run.go · creates collision-safe .dross/security/<run> dirs with sortable <timestamp>-<short-sha> ids

t-2.notes: feature: scanner tooling sweep · Catalog/ScannersFor/Detect @ internal/security/catalog.go · data-driven Go-complete+agnostic scanner catalog with PATH availability detection

t-3.notes: feature: findings ledger · Ledger/Finding/Severity @ internal/security/findings.go · per-finding findings.toml with contextual severity, refutation-gated survivors, malformed-input guard

t-4.notes: feature: context-free recon · DetectLanguages/BuildManifest @ internal/security/recon.go · code-only language detection that skips .dross/ + a ran/skipped tool-coverage manifest

t-5.notes: feature: remediation scaffold · ScaffoldSpec @ internal/security/scaffold.go · findings.toml ledger → spec.toml, one criticals-first criterion per finding citing its ledger id; refuses zero-survivor scaffolds

t-6.notes: feature: dross security CLI · Security/detect/run/scaffold @ internal/cmd/security.go · cobra surface for run-dir creation, scanner detection, and sandboxed (containedPath) findings→spec scaffold

t-7.notes: feature: dross-secure audit command · secure.md @ assets/prompts/secure.md · context-free multi-pass security audit prompt — scanners + refute-panel, read-only, scaffolds a remediation phase

t-8.notes: feature: secure prompt content gate · TestSecurePromptMandatedSections @ internal/cmd/secure_prompt_test.go · per-criterion sub-assertions pinning the four mandated secure.md rules

t-9.notes: feature: security report privacy · .dross/security/ gitignored · run artifacts kept local (behavioural git check-ignore test) so raw findings never pre-disclose on a public repo
